settings.heading: Everything OPENXMLJSON can do.
settings.subheading: A cross-platform desktop viewer for very large JSON, NDJSON, XML, CSV and TSV files, built on a zero-copy, memory-mapped engine. Here's the complete feature set, category by category.

settings.heading: Ready to open your biggest file?
settings.subheading: Download OPENXMLJSON, or buy a Premium license and remove the size limit for good.
